founding.title: A neighborhood barber shop with a simple focus.
paragraphs: Acapulco Barber Shop is a neighborhood barber shop in Dallas. The verified listing identifies Chefo as the owner, and the shop’s public presence centers on practical grooming and consistent service.
If you want to confirm what’s available, the best next step is to call the shop directly before you visit.

standard.title: The Acapulco
paragraphs: The experience is built to be straightforward: clear communication, clean results, and a visit that fits into your day.
We keep the copy simple because the best next step is direct conversation with the shop.
